back_translation: Therefore, I urge first of all that there be petition-pleading, prayer, intercession-on-behalf-of-others, and giving-thanks, for all people
For kings, and for all who are in positions of authority, so that we may lead lives in calmness and in quiet-peacefulness, with all godly-reverence and dignified-grace
Such action is good and is acceptable to Him before the presence of God our Savior
He who desires that all people receive salvation, and come to the knowledge of the truth
For there is only one God, and there is only one mediator between God and humans, namely Jesus Christ who is human
Who gave Himself as a ransom for all, as a witness at the appropriate time
For this very purpose, I have been appointed to be a proclaimer and apostle — I am speaking the truth, I am not speaking falsehood — and a teacher of the Gentiles in the matter of faith and truth
Therefore, I desire that the men everywhere pray, lifting up holy hands, without anger and without quarreling
Likewise, I desire that the women dress in a respectable-orderly manner, with humility and self-restraint, not with elaborate-braided hairstyles, gold, pearls, or expensive clothing
But with good deeds, as is fitting for women who profess to have reverent fear of God
Let a woman learn in calm-quietness and in full obedient-submission
I do not permit a woman to teach, or to exercise authority over a man, but to remain in calm-quietness
For Adam was created first, then Eve
And Adam was not deceived, but the woman was deceived and fell into transgression
But she will receive salvation through childbearing, if they remain in faith, love, and holiness together with self-restraint
